flavour_text: The fire of the hearth is a docile dog,
leashed and tamed.
The fire of the First Ones is a ravening wolf,
wild and free.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Ashscale Talisman

records.implicit_text:
Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed
Has Elder, Shaper and all Conqueror Influences
records.name: Astrolabe Amulet

flavour_text: The first ones live where they can, where they must.
They embrace the frost, the storm, the drought.
Waxing and waning, breaking and mending,
living with time and happenstance, as must we.
- The Wolven King
records.implicit_text: 50% of Lightning Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage
records.name: Avian Twins Talisman

flavour_text: The first ones live where they can, where they must.
They embrace the frost, the storm, the drought.
Waxing and waning, breaking and mending,
living with time and happenstance, as must we.
- The Wolven King

Waxing and waning, breaking and mending,
living with time and happenstance, as must we.
- The Wolven King

living with time and happenstance, as must we.
- The Wolven King

living with time and happenstance, as must we.
- The Wolven King

flavour_text: The first ones live where they can, where they must.
They embrace the frost, the storm, the drought.
Waxing and waning, breaking and mending,
living with time and happenstance, as must we.
- The Wolven King
records.implicit_text: 50% of Lightning Damage from Hits taken as Cold Damage
records.name: Avian Twins Talisman (Lightning-To-Cold)

flavour_text: The First Ones stalk with us
upon this lifelong hunt,
and cast their contempt
upon those that would make us their prey.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Black Maw Talisman

flavour_text: The civilised man must wrestle
with the demands of heart and mind.
The First Ones share no such struggle.
For their Spirit is swift and deadly certain.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Bonespire Talisman

flavour_text: I stood among the stones
And called out to the First Ones;
That with tooth and mighty claw,
They should tear our enemies asunder.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Breakrib Talisman

flavour_text: The world of the First Ones is harsh;
We struggle on our bellies to survive.
But that which imprisons us also changes us
And soon we will emerge anew.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Chrysalis Talisman

flavour_text: Fear the children of the First Ones.
Let fear shield your back.
And let the dullard speak of bravery
when the First Ones come for him.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Clutching Talisman

flavour_text: The Empire poisons our blood with sweet wine.
Poisons our flesh with silk.
Poisons our minds with civil lies.
Poisons our children with servitude.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Deadhand Talisman

flavour_text: We have basked in the cloying warmth of servitude.
Now the First Ones harden us
against the numbing chill of despair
so that freedom will not slip through our trembling fingers.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Deep One Talisman

flavour_text: The First Ones are the forever ones.
There is no dust of the hourglass in their blood.
No fissures of weariness in their faces.
To drink of their blood is to drink of time itself.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Fangjaw Talisman

records.implicit_text:
-1 Prefix Modifier allowed
-2 Suffix Modifiers allowed
Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed
100% increased Explicit Modifier magnitudes
records.name: Focused Amulet

flavour_text: The wolf greeted the king,
In the light of the harvest moon.
The wolf offered the strength of the wild,
And the king paid for it in blood.
records.name: Greatwolf Talisman

flavour_text: The Hunter faced the First One
and notched his final arrow.
The First One bared its fangs
and savoured its final breath.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Hexclaw Talisman

flavour_text: The Empire hides lies and falsehoods
Behind a mask of politeness and civility.
The First Ones teach us to look through the lies,
And that no beast can truly cover their tracks.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Horned Talisman

flavour_text: The First Ones thundered over Ezomyr
upon hooves of grey and black.
The people felt their stamping rage
and cowered as the fury rained down.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Lone Antler Talisman

flavour_text: We grew contemptuous of our past.
Dismissed the first ones as ignorant and wild.
We were fools and naive children
to turn our backs on our inheritance.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Longtooth Talisman

flavour_text: The First Ones hold us
between two sharpened blades.
That should we stray too far from the path,
we find ourselves severed.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Mandible Talisman

flavour_text: Look not upon me with fear, my men.
Though I seem strange, even monstrous,
were you to see with the eyes of your forebears,
your hearts would be filled with wonder.
- The Wolven King
records.implicit_text: 10% chance to gain an Endurance Charge on Kill
records.name: Monkey Paw Talisman

flavour_text: Look not upon me with fear, my men.
Though I seem strange, even monstrous,
were you to see with the eyes of your forebears,
your hearts would be filled with wonder.
- The Wolven King
records.implicit_text: 10% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill
records.name: Monkey Paw Talisman (Frenzy)

flavour_text: Look not upon me with fear, my men.
Though I seem strange, even monstrous,
were you to see with the eyes of your forebears,
your hearts would be filled with wonder.
- The Wolven King
records.implicit_text: 10% chance to gain a Power Charge on Kill
records.name: Monkey Paw Talisman (Power)

flavour_text: The first ones marked their hunting grounds
with blood and piss.
We have tried to paint our future in words.
Now we shall paint with inks of savagery.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Monkey Twins Talisman

flavour_text: With the will of the first ones in our sinews
we shall tear down the walls of Sarn.
Yet as is the way of the wildlands,
Only the strong may grow stronger.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Primal Skull Talisman

flavour_text: To catch a big fish you need tempting bait.
And there is no fish bigger than the Empire,
and no bait as tempting as Ezomyr.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Rot Head Talisman

flavour_text: Death met with the First Ones
and demanded they hunt with mercy.
For while pain might delight the mind,
it does not fill the belly.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Rotfeather Talisman

records.implicit_text: (10-15)% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
records.name: Seaglass Amulet

records.implicit_text:
-2 Prefix Modifiers allowed
-1 Suffix Modifier allowed
Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed
100% increased Explicit Modifier magnitudes
records.name: Simplex Amulet

flavour_text: We Ezomytes are beasts of burden
bearing wealth of an empire on our backs,
growing lean and strong
while our masters grow fat and weak.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Spinefuse Talisman

flavour_text: From flesh and ferocity,
the First Ones roamed
through the realm of Spirit,
and into the darkness beyond.
- The Wolven King
records.implicit_text: (4-6)% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite
records.name: Splitnewt Talisman

flavour_text: We breed thoughts of single mind,
fashion tools of single purpose.
While the First Ones bring to bear
anything that the wildlands provide.
- The Wolven King
records.implicit_text: Gain (6-12)% of Physical Damage as Extra Damage of a random Element
records.name: Three Hands Talisman

flavour_text: When we free ourselves from the shackles
of civilised existence
we learn to feed and run and breathe
as the First Ones have always done.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Three Rat Talisman

flavour_text: 'Sleep when you are weary,' our mothers told us.
'Sleep when you are dead,' our fathers told us.
To the First Ones, the slumbering and the corpse
are one and the same.
- The Wolven King
records.implicit_text: +1 to maximum number of Raised Zombies
records.name: Undying Flesh Talisman

flavour_text: It's said to be noble to stand one's ground.
To soak the earth in stalwart blood.
While the First Ones chose to laugh and run
and caper with untamed glee.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Wereclaw Talisman

flavour_text: For too long we have crawled in darkness,
scavenging through rotten scraps.
The First Ones teach us to scavenge until we can hunt,
and then never crawl again.
- The Wolven King
records.name: Writhing Talisman

flavour_text: Of ash and avalanche,
in storm and flesh,
we dream of unity.
The time approaches...
